method: decode backbone = weight-streaming BW (fit 1B+3B -> predict 8B), weight_bytes from op_profile; non-streaming terms reported standalone.

TTFT remainder = weight-load memory (~0.41s) + prefill attention (S^2 softmax) + host overhead (Phase-2 fidelity). prefill_ms_median degenerate, unused.
